title: Publish current draft as live version

requirements.summary: Publish the current draft (Version 10 with the darker background theme) as the live production version without any modifications
acceptanceCriteria: The current draft state, including the dark background theme, is deployed as the live version.
No code changes are made — the build reflects the draft exactly as it stands.

file_operations.description: Verify the current routing configuration is production-ready with all pages (Home, Menu, Cart, Order Confirmation) properly wired and no draft/debug flags enabled.
Confirm the dark background theme (Version 10) OKLCH color tokens are finalized and production-ready with no temporary overrides or draft comments.
Ensure all theme customizations (dark mode, fonts, colors, border radius) match the Version 10 draft specification and are production-stable.
